product_results.title: USB C Charger for iPhone 17 16 15, MFI Certified 20W Type C Charger Fast Charging Block with USB C to C Cable for iPhone 17/16/15 Pro Max/15/16 Pro/15/16 Plus/Pad Pro 12.9/11/Air and More

summary.text: The charging adapter functions well and works perfectly with iPhone 15 and 16 models. Customers find it charges fast and is faster than older lightning cords. The cord length receives positive feedback for being nice and long. However, some users report durability issues, with the adapter breaking super fast and the end breaking off in their phone. Customers have mixed experiences with compatibility and heat generation.

authors_reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Perfect Fast Charger for My iPhone!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this 20W USB-C MFi Certified charger for my iPhone (works great with 15/16/17 models), and it exceeded my expectations! The build quality feels solid, and it’s noticeably smaller and more compact than other chargers I’ve used — perfect for travel, work, or everyday use.What I love:✔️ Fast charging — gets my iPhone up to 50% in about 30 minutes.✔️ MFi Certified — no warnings or errors about non-Apple accessories.✔️ Universal compatibility — works with iPads and AirPods too!✔️ Stays cool — doesn’t overheat even during longer charge sessions.✔️ Great value — excellent performance for the price.
authors_reviews.author: HELEN DE WILD

authors_reviews.title: I’m happy that I have this product
authors_reviews.text: I have been using this product since around 3 weeks more or less. It is good, reliable and functioning properly for the short terms since I have been using it. On the long term, I need to wait and see if it is durable and shall be long lasting. Closing sentence, it is good and I am happy with it so far.
authors_reviews.author: Mohammad Al-Hossainy

authors_reviews.title: Fast Charger for real
authors_reviews.text: Incredibly fast shipping—arrived the next day! The cable itself works perfectly and definitely delivers on the 'Quick Charger' promise. Very satisfied. Two chargers is in it, very worth it.
authors_reviews.author: Zen

authors_reviews.title: Perfect! For someone who loses chargers fast!
authors_reviews.text: Perfect! Fast charge and 2 chargers helped me 2 keep one at home and carry other with me. I love the fact that its a rare color so I wont loose it like I lost 1 black charger previously.
authors_reviews.author: Guneet Kaur

authors_reviews.title: Definitely recommend
authors_reviews.text: Change the phone very fast and as it is compatible with iPhone so once phone charge it lasts longer.
authors_reviews.author: Deep
